summary: Privacy policy page displays correct content and structure but violates diner aesthetic requirements with generic neutral styling instead of required brand palette

violations.description: Page uses generic neutral gray/beige background instead of required diner teal #9fd8d2 for public pages or cream #fff8ea for legal content
Content card uses generic beige/neutral surface instead of required cream surface #fff8ea for cards and legal surfaces
Legal page has drifted into generic palette treatment instead of maintaining coherent brand visual language with public routes

actions: Apply diner aesthetic palette with teal page background #9fd8d2 and cream card surface #fff8ea
Ensure legal page maintains visual consistency with public marketing chrome per brand palette requirements
Verify content structure meets privacy screen spec requirements (already satisfied)
